legal_model.notes_normalized: Cannabis is illegal in Vatican City / Vaticano. Medical cannabis is illegal. Distribution is tolerated. Prison exposure detected.

notes_raw: Cannabis is illegal in Vatican City, and possession or use is prosecuted under Italian-based criminal law applied within the Holy See.
